victoryaxis.style: {axis: {stroke: 'transparent'}, ticks: {stroke: 'transparent'}, grid: {stroke: 'transparent'}, tickLabels: {fill: '#73857E', fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 500, fontFamily: 'Expensify Neue', padding: 24}}

{axis: {stroke: 'transparent'}, ticks: {stroke: 'transparent'}, grid: {stroke: '#E6E1DA', strokeWidth: 1}, tickLabels: {fill: '#73857E', fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 500, fontFamily: 'Expensify Neue', padding: 8}}

victorybar.data: [{x: 'Employee E', y: 8565}, {x: 'Employee D', y: 14501}, {x: 'Employee C', y: 20112}, {x: 'Employee B (Marketing/PR)', y: 28558}, {x: 'Employee A', y: 257938}]

victorylegend.data: [{name: 'This month', symbol: {type: 'circle', fill: '#13C96B', size: 6}}, {name: 'Last month', symbol: {type: 'circle', fill: '#1E90F2', size: 6}}]
